      mode: gre
      local: 10.10.10.2

      addresses:
      - 10.10.2.5/30
      ttl: 64

# Generated by PE Manager — desired static routes
network:
  version: 2
  tunnels:
    acme-test:
      mode: gre
      local: 10.10.10.2
      remote: 10.1.1.1
      addresses:
      - 10.10.2.5/30
      ttl: 64
      routes:
      - to: 10.99.0.20
        via: 10.10.2.6
      - to: 12.12.12.3/32

10.21.0.4/30 dev sino_test proto kernel scope link src 10.21.0.5

10.200.0.4/30 dev wg0 scope link

30.30.30.1 dev wg0 scope link

root@10ghk-web:~# ip add

    link/loopback 00:00:00:00:00:00 brd 00:00:00:00:00:00
    inet 127.0.0.1/8 scope host lo
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
    inet6 ::1/128 scope host noprefixroute 
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
2: ens18: <BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 1500 qdisc fq_codel state UP group default qlen 1000
    link/ether bc:24:11:01:3b:1c brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff
    altname enp0s18
    inet 10.0.20.2/24 brd 10.0.20.255 scope global ens18
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
    inet6 fe80::be24:11ff:fe01:3b1c/64 scope link 
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
3: gre0@NONE: <NOARP> mtu 1476 qdisc noop state DOWN group default qlen 1000
    link/gre 0.0.0.0 brd 0.0.0.0
4: gretap0@NONE: <BROADCAST,MULTICAST> mtu 1462 qdisc noop state DOWN group default qlen 1000
    link/ether 00:00:00:00:00:00 brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff
5: erspan0@NONE: <BROADCAST,MULTICAST> mtu 1450 qdisc noop state DOWN group default qlen 1000
    link/ether 00:00:00:00:00:00 brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff
6: tun_sino@NONE: <POINTOPOINT,NOARP,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 1476 qdisc htb state UNKNOWN group default qlen 1000
    link/gre 10.0.20.2 peer 18.18.10.1
7: vxlan102: <BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 1500 qdisc noqueue state UNKNOWN group default qlen 1000
    link/ether 7a:80:56:bc:31:f4 brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff
    inet6 fe80::7880:56ff:febc:31f4/64 scope link 
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever

    link/none 
    inet 10.200.0.5/30 scope global wg0
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
19: acme-test@NONE: <POINTOPOINT,NOARP,UP,LOWER_UP> mtu 1476 qdisc noqueue state UNKNOWN group default qlen 1000
    link/gre 10.10.10.1 peer 10.20.20.1
    inet 10.10.2.5/30 brd 10.10.2.7 scope global acme-test

    inet 10.21.0.5/30 brd 10.21.0.7 scope global sino_test
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
